sentences.target: On voit le duc au musée.

translations.fr: On voit le duc au musée.
translations.en: We see the duke at the museum.
translations.es: Vemos al duque en el museo.
translations.de: Wir sehen den Herzog im Museum.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在博物馆看到了公爵。
translations.yue: 我哋喺博物館見到個公爵。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy công tước ở bảo tàng.
translations.nl: We zien de hertog in het museum.
translations.hi: हम संग्रहालय में ड्यूक को देखते हैं.
translations.id: Kami melihat sang adipati di museum.
translations.ro: Îl vedem pe ducele la muzeu.
translations.ja: 私たちは博物館で公爵を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun used generically; here it is the grammatical subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'duc'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'voit' within the NP 'le duc'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the article 'le' (à + le → au); introduces the locative PP 'au musée'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu parles du duc dans la série.
sentences.reading: /ty paʁl dy dyk dɑ̃ la seʁi/

translations.fr: Tu parles du duc dans la série.
translations.ipa: /ty paʁl dy dyk dɑ̃ la seʁi/
translations.en: You're talking about the duke in the show.
translations.es: Estás hablando del duque en la serie.
translations.de: Du sprichst über den Herzog in der Serie.
translations.it: Stai parlando del duca nella serie.
translations.ko: 너는 그 드라마의 공작에 대해 이야기하고 있다.
translations.yue: 你喺講嗰套劇入面嗰個公爵。
translations.ru: Ты говоришь о герцоге в сериале.
translations.pt: Você está falando do duque na série.
translations.vi: Bạn đang nói về công tước trong bộ phim.
translations.ar: أنت تتحدث عن الدوق في المسلسل.
translations.nl: Je praat over de hertog in de serie.
translations.uk: Ти говориш про герцога в серіалі.
translations.hi: तुम शो में उस ड्यूक के बारे में बात कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Μιλάς για τον δούκα στη σειρά.
translations.nb: Du snakker om hertugen i serien.
translations.id: Kamu sedang membicarakan sang adipati di serial itu.
translations.sv: Du pratar om hertigen i serien.
translations.da: Du taler om hertugen i serien.
translations.ja: あなたはそのドラマの公爵について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' (de + le → du); introduces the complement 'du duc'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.
Simple preposition; introduces the locative/setting PP 'dans la série'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'série'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Le duc arrive à trois heures.

translations.fr: Le duc arrive à trois heures.
translations.en: The duke arrives at three o'clock.
translations.es: El duque llega a las tres.
translations.de: Der Herzog kommt um drei Uhr an.
translations.vi: Công tước đến lúc ba giờ.
translations.nl: De hertog komt om drie uur.
translations.ja: 公爵は三時に到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject NP 'Le duc'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition marking time; introduces the temporal PP 'à trois heures'.
Cardinal numeral; modifier within the time expression.
Common noun, plural; head of the temporal NP 'trois heures'.

sentences.target: J’ai acheté un livre sur ce duc.
sentences.reading: /ʒe aʃte œ̃ livʁ syʁ sə dyk/

translations.fr: J’ai acheté un livre sur ce duc.
translations.ipa: /ʒe aʃte œ̃ livʁ syʁ sə dyk/
translations.en: I bought a book about this duke.
translations.es: Compré un libro sobre este duque.
translations.de: Ich habe ein Buch über diesen Herzog gekauft.
translations.it: Ho comprato un libro su questo duca.
translations.ko: 나는 이 공작에 관한 책을 샀다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我买了一本关于这位公爵的书。
translations.yue: 我買咗一本關於呢位公爵嘅書。
translations.ru: Я купил книгу об этом герцоге.
translations.pt: Comprei um livro sobre este duque.
translations.tr: Bu dük hakkında bir kitap aldım.
translations.vi: Tôi đã mua một cuốn sách về vị công tước này.
translations.nl: Ik heb een boek gekocht over deze hertog.
translations.uk: Я купив книгу про цього герцога.
translations.hu: Vettem egy könyvet erről a hercegről.
translations.hi: मैंने इस ड्यूक के बारे में एक किताब खरीदी.
translations.el: Αγόρασα ένα βιβλίο για αυτόν τον δούκα.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøpte en bok om denne hertugen.
translations.id: Saya membeli sebuah buku tentang adipati ini.
translations.sv: Jag köpte en bok om den här hertigen.
translations.ro: Am cumpărat o carte despre acest duce.
translations.cs: Koupil jsem knihu o tomto vévodovi.
translations.da: Jeg købte en bog om denne hertug.
translations.ja: この公爵についての本を買いました。

tokens.explanation: Auxiliary verb 'ai' (present 1st person singular of 'avoir') used to form the passé composé; surface includes the attached clitic subject 'j’'.
Past participle of the main verb; complements the auxiliary to form a compound past.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'livre'.
Common noun; direct object of 'ai acheté'.
Preposition; introduces the PP 'sur ce duc' (topic/subject matter).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'duc'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
